Our Story

More Than Photos —
We Preserve Legacies

7+
Years of Excellence

At Dapsy Visual, we don't just take pictures — we tell stories. Led by our passionate lead photographer and creative director, every session is approached with artistic vision and technical mastery. Founded in the heart of Ondo, we have spent years mastering the art of capturing genuine emotions, quiet beauty, and once-in-a-lifetime moments that deserve to live forever.

Every session with us is a personal experience. From the lighting to the final edit, we obsess over every detail so that when you hold that photo years from now, it takes you right back to exactly how you felt in that moment.

500+
Happy Clients
200+
Weddings Covered
48hr
Delivery Guarantee
100%

What We Offer

Our Photography Services

Every client is unique. Every story is different. We offer tailored photography experiences for every occasion.

Studio Portraits

Professional lighting, premium backdrops, and expert direction to make you shine. Perfect for birthdays, personal branding, and milestone moments.

Starting from ₦15,000

Book Now
Wedding Photography

From morning preparations to the last dance — we document every chapter of your love story with elegance, precision, and a full cinematic team.

Packages from ₦250,000 – ₦700,000

Book Now
Pre-Wedding Shoots

Romantic, fun, and truly you. Our pre-wedding sessions celebrate your unique chemistry as a couple in beautiful, relaxed settings.

Starting from ₦60,000

Book Now
Traditional Weddings & Events

Graduations, naming ceremonies, traditional weddings, and more — if it matters to you, it matters to us. We capture the full energy of your special day.

Starting from ₦50,000

Book Now
Graduation & Milestone Shoots

Celebrate your achievements in style. Our graduation and milestone sessions are designed to reflect your hard work, pride, and personality.

Starting from ₦15,000

Book Now
✦
Custom Package?

Family sessions, maternity shoots, corporate branding — let's create something tailored just for you. Chat us and let's make magic happen.

I used Dapsy Visual for my graduation photos and wow — the editing is on another level! The pictures came out magazine quality. All my friends are asking who shot them. Fast delivery too, I had my photos by the next day!

The Dapsy Difference

Why Clients Choose Us

◈
Premium Quality Editing

Every photo undergoes meticulous colour grading, skin retouching, and creative post-processing. We don't just edit — we elevate.

⚡
Guaranteed Fast Delivery

We know you can't wait. That's why we guarantee edited photos within 24–48 hours — so you can share your joy while it's still fresh.

₦
Honest, Transparent Pricing

Premium photography shouldn't cost a fortune. Our packages are designed to give maximum value at prices that make sense for Ondo families and businesses.

◎
Professional Studio Equipment

We invest in the best. Our studio uses studio-grade lighting rigs, top-tier cameras, and a range of professional backdrops for every creative vision.

♡
Warm, Friendly Experience

Not a fan of cameras? That's okay. We guide you through every pose and expression until you feel completely natural and at ease.
